mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inventory_stocks (material_id, lot_number, origin, net_weight, quantity, expiry_date, arrival_date, inspected) VALUES (#{materialId}, #{lotNumber}, #{origin}, #{netWeight}, #{quantity}, #{expiryDate}, #{arrivalDate}, #{inspected}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE quantity = quantity + VALUES(quantity), inspected = VALUES(inspected)
mapper.select:
SELECT id, material_id, lot_number, origin, quantity, reserved_quantity, expiry_date, arrival_date, inspected, created_at FROM inventory_stocks WHERE material_id = #{materialId} AND (quantity - reserved_quantity) > 0
AND origin IN
#{o}
ORDER BY expiry_date ASC, arrival_date ASC, created_at ASC
SELECT DISTINCT origin FROM inventory_stocks WHERE material_id = #{materialId} AND origin IS NOT NULL AND origin != '' AND (quantity - reserved_quantity) > 0 ORDER BY origin ASC
SELECT * FROM inventory_stocks WHERE material_id = #{materialId} AND (quantity - reserved_quantity) > 0 ORDER BY expiry_date ASC, created_at ASC
SELECT s.*, m.name AS materialName FROM inventory_stocks s INNER JOIN materials m ON s.material_id = m.id WHERE m.material_type = #{materialType} ORDER BY s.expiry_date ASC, s.arrival_date ASC
